title: Opendoor's Cohort Metrics Jump 3x: Is Opendoor 2.0 Changing the Narrative?
text: Opendoor's Cohort Metrics Jump 3x: Is It 2.0 Changing the Narrative? Recent earnings updates suggest that Opendoor 2.0 is meaningfully changing the company's operational narrative. Key metrics show: Contract volumes have surged 3x, with weekly contract pace doubling from 120 homes to 230, Acquisition velocity has accelerated significantly, with Q4 guidance pointing to at least 35% sequential increase, Unit economics of newer cohorts are substantially improved, with October and January cohorts showing best-in-company-history metrics. These improvements suggest that the velocity-focused model is delivering better operational performance than the previous acquisition-heavy approach. If sustained, these trends could support management's ambitious profitability targets for 2026.
